title: Stewie Explains OAuth to Confused Peter

dialogue.line: Stewie, what's this OAuth thing I keep hearing about?
Think of OAuth like a valet key for your apps, Peter.
A valet key? I still can't parallel park, you know.
OAuth lets apps access your info without handling your password.
You authorize an app to interact with another on your behalf.
It's like saying, 'Yes, you can borrow my dog, but no driving!'
So like logging in to a game with my email?
Exactly, it keeps your credentials private and secure, my simple friend.
And here I thought it was an Irish folk dance!
Oh, Peter, stick to dancing with your food.
